decisions.decision: Phase 13 must remain open even though a fullscreen presentation implementation exists
decisions.rationale: Working fullscreen behavior is not the same as meeting the intended Awwwards-level quality bar

decisions.decision: Keep the current fullscreen code and phase artifacts as the baseline instead of deleting them
decisions.rationale: They provide a concrete starting point for the real completion pass
User explicitly rejected mouse-follow movement as low-quality compared with reference sites

decisions.decision: Keep ESC/navigation hint always visible in Presentation.exe
decisions.rationale: Persistent on-screen wayfinding is required for users to know how to exit
